spec.name: In The Dense Forest Between The Hills
spec.description: You are at the end of a small shaded path leading between the trees. The forest is quite thick here, and the ground is very rough and hilly, halting your progress. The path lies to the south.

south.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

extra_descs.description: The shaded path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
The terrian is very hilly and rough to the north and west. You have heard that there is a halfling village somewhere in the hills.
